texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Siemens PostCap™ Technology CO2 Post Combustion Capture
texts.text: Siemens PostCap™ Technology CO2 Post Combustion Capture

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For combined cycle and steam power plant applications
texts.text: For combined cycle and steam power plant applications

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Power Generation from fossil fuels will still account for the major share of the energy mix in the next decades. Siemens developed the PostCap™ CO2 capture technology to reduce the CO2 footprint of coal- and gasfired power plants.
texts.text: Power Generation from fossil fuels will still account for the major share of the energy mix in the next decades. Siemens developed the PostCap™ CO2 capture technology to reduce the CO2 footprint of coal- and gasfired power plants.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: PostCap™ has been successfully validated in its pilot plant located at E.ON's coal-fired power station Staudinger, Germany and it is now ready for large-scale application.
texts.text: PostCap™ has been successfully validated in its pilot plant located at E.ON's coal-fired power station Staudinger, Germany and it is now ready for large-scale application.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Environmentally friendly amino acid salt solvent
texts.text: Environmentally friendly amino acid salt solvent

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Good solvent stability against degradation (particularly oxygen)
texts.text: Good solvent stability against degradation (particularly oxygen)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Minimal detectable solvent emissions in cleaned flue gas
texts.text: Minimal detectable solvent emissions in cleaned flue gas

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Low energy consumption by enhanced process configuration
texts.text: Low energy consumption by enhanced process configuration

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Smart two-step reclaiming system with very limited solvent losses
texts.text: Smart two-step reclaiming system with very limited solvent losses

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Ease of handling by power plant operators and personnel
texts.text: Ease of handling by power plant operators and personnel

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Siemens in-house competencies for power plants with CO2 Capture
texts.text: Siemens in-house competencies for power plants with CO2 Capture

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Siemens provides technology along the whole process chain from power generation to CO2 scrubbing as well as CO2 compression. Therefore, Siemens is an ideal partner for the implementation of power plant solutions with CCS.
texts.text: Siemens provides technology along the whole process chain from power generation to CO2 scrubbing as well as CO2 compression. Therefore, Siemens is an ideal partner for the implementation of power plant solutions with CCS.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Siemens as a manufacturer of gas and steam turbines has broad expertise in the design, construction and delivery of power plant solutions up to the delivery of turnkey plants. Its portfolio ranges from small to large-scale applications in the industry and power sector.
texts.text: Siemens as a manufacturer of gas and steam turbines has broad expertise in the design, construction and delivery of power plant solutions up to the delivery of turnkey plants. Its portfolio ranges from small to large-scale applications in the industry and power sector.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Siemens is experienced in the development and optimization of chemical processes. Comprehensive chemical databases, forefront process simulation and design tools are available. Own in-house laboratories and the PostCap™ pilot plant contributes to the development of CO2 Capture technology.
texts.text: Siemens is experienced in the development and optimization of chemical processes. Comprehensive chemical databases, forefront process simulation and design tools are available. Own in-house laboratories and the PostCap™ pilot plant contributes to the development of CO2 Capture technology.

texts.text: Further products and solutions along the entire CCS chain can be offered, e.g.:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Automation equipment and solutions for transport and injection
texts.text: Automation equipment and solutions for transport and injection

texts.label: text
texts.orig: PostCap™ is based on absorption-desorption principle and uses an amino acid salt (AAS) solvent. At least 90% of the CO2 from flue gas of power plants can be separated.
texts.text: PostCap™ is based on absorption-desorption principle and uses an amino acid salt (AAS) solvent. At least 90% of the CO2 from flue gas of power plants can be separated.

texts.text: with solvent to capture the CO2. On top of

texts.text: by a blower into the absorber.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Desorption Process: CO2-rich solvent is taken from the absorber, heated and fed into the desorber. There, CO2 is desorbed from solvent by heat introduction and released on top of the desorber. CO2 lean solvent is cooled and redirected to the absorber.
texts.text: Desorption Process: CO2-rich solvent is taken from the absorber, heated and fed into the desorber. There, CO2 is desorbed from solvent by heat introduction and released on top of the desorber. CO2 lean solvent is cooled and redirected to the absorber.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Flue gas trace compounds lead to solvent contamination. Reclaiming of solvent is required to maintain process performance and minimize solvent losses.
texts.text: Flue gas trace compounds lead to solvent contamination. Reclaiming of solvent is required to maintain process performance and minimize solvent losses.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Siemens applies a two-step reclaiming process:
texts.text: Siemens applies a two-step reclaiming process:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Full recovery of SOx contaminated solvent and generation of a marketable sulfur product
texts.text: Full recovery of SOx contaminated solvent and generation of a marketable sulfur product

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Highly selective separation of AAS solvent from degradation products
texts.text: Highly selective separation of AAS solvent from degradation products

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Independent operation of each reclaiming step
texts.text: Independent operation of each reclaiming step
